posts.author: Mint
posts.text: Q4 results 2026: IRCTC to ONGC among companies to declare Q4 results today; check full list here

posts.author: gsapte
posts.text: I would like to know if there are any tailwinds for IRCTC. As of now, it seems that, stock has corrected sharply from 1000+ and trading in a range of 800-600 for a prolonged period. What are other high margin revenue streams that may drive higher Sales and PAT growth, apart from Catering which has high margin. Is it common for a monopoly stock to remain range bound for such a long time. There is low EPS growth since FY24, and P/E has de-rated from 55 to 30. Probably my experience with PSU monopoly investments is limited hence checking with community.
